requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — SSB / EAS / EBS Requirements for PV Inverters in Suriname
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——苏里南SSB / EAS / EBS光伏逆变器要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——蘇里南SSB / EAS / EBS光伏逆變器要求

summary.en: Suriname's national standards body SSB (Surinaams Standaarden Bureau) adopts IEC international standards. For solar PV inverters, the applicable safety standards are IEC 62109-1 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters). These standards cover electrical safety, protection against electric shock, insulation, thermal requirements, mechanical requirements, and markings relevant to PV power conversion equipment. EAS (Energie Autoriteit Suriname) and EBS (N.V. Energiebedrijven Suriname) reference IEC standards for equipment connected to the Suriname grid. Third-party type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is expected by project owners and EBS interconnection review for grid-tied installations. Suriname does not currently operate a standalone mandatory safety certification scheme for PV inverters equivalent to CE Marking or UL Listing; however, IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence is the internationally recognised safety baseline expected by technically informed buyers and EBS.
summary.zh: 苏里南国家标准机构SSB（苏里南标准局）采纳IEC国际标准。适用于太阳能光伏逆变器的安全标准为IEC 62109-1（光伏电力系统用功率变换器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆变器特殊要求）。这些标准涵盖与光伏功率变换设备相关的电气安全、防电击保护、绝缘、热要求、机械要求和标识。EAS（苏里南能源监管局）和EBS（苏里南能源公司）引用IEC标准作为接入苏里南电网设备的依据。来自ILAC认可实验室的第三方型式试验证据是并网装置项目业主和EBS互联审查的预期证据。苏里南目前未实施与CE认证或UL认证相当的独立强制性光伏逆变器安全认证制度；但IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据是技术专业买家和EBS预期的国际认可安全基准。
summary.zht: 蘇里南國家標準機構SSB（蘇里南標準局）採納IEC國際標準。適用於太陽能光伏逆變器的安全標準為IEC 62109-1（光伏電力系統用功率轉換器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆變器特殊要求）。這些標準涵蓋與光伏功率轉換設備相關的電氣安全、防電擊保護、絕緣、熱要求、機械要求和標識。EAS（蘇里南能源監管局）和EBS（蘇里南能源公司）引用IEC標準作為接入蘇里南電網設備的依據。來自ILAC認可實驗室的第三方型式試驗證據是併網裝置項目業主和EBS互聯審查的預期證據。蘇里南目前未實施與CE認證或UL認證相當的獨立強制性光伏逆變器安全認證制度；但IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據是技術專業買家和EBS預期的國際認可安全基準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements (adopted by SSB as national standard reference)
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters (adopted by SSB as national standard reference)
SSB (Surinaams Standaarden Bureau) — national standards body; IEC adoption framework
EAS (Energie Autoriteit Suriname) — energy sector regulatory authority
EBS (N.V. Energiebedrijven Suriname) — utility; interconnection equipment technical review

summary.en: China's primary voluntary standard for PV grid-connected inverter safety is GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which covers classification, environmental conditions, safety, electrical performance, EMC, and markings. GB/T 37408 is assessed by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. It shares conceptual safety intent with IEC 62109-1/-2 but is not harmonised with IEC 62109 and is not accepted by SSB, EAS, or EBS as equivalent to IEC 62109 type-test evidence. Additionally, IEC 62109 safety tests are conducted under specific grid conditions — for Suriname, the relevant grid configuration is 60 Hz / 127-220 V, not the 50 Hz / 220-380 V conditions under which Chinese GB/T tests are conducted. This means even if a Chinese laboratory re-ran tests using IEC 62109 methods, the 50 Hz test configuration would not cover Suriname's 60 Hz operating environment.
summary.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器安全的主要自愿性标准为GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求），涵盖分类、环境条件、安全、电气性能、EMC和标识。GB/T 37408由中国CNAS认可实验室评估。其安全意图与IEC 62109-1/-2在概念层面相近，但未与IEC 62109协调，不被SSB、EAS或EBS接受为IEC 62109型式试验证据的等效依据。此外，IEC 62109安全测试在特定电网条件下进行——对于苏里南，相关电网配置为60 Hz / 127-220 V，而非中国GB/T测试采用的50 Hz / 220-380 V条件。这意味着即使中国实验室使用IEC 62109方法重新测试，50 Hz测试配置也无法涵盖苏里南60 Hz运行环境。
summary.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器安全的主要自願性標準為GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求），涵蓋分類、環境條件、安全、電氣性能、EMC和標識。GB/T 37408由中國CNAS認可實驗室評估。其安全意圖與IEC 62109-1/-2在概念層面相近，但未與IEC 62109協調，不被SSB、EAS或EBS接受為IEC 62109型式試驗證據的等效依據。此外，IEC 62109安全測試在特定電網條件下進行——對於蘇里南，相關電網配置為60 Hz / 127-220 V，而非中國GB/T測試採用的50 Hz / 220-380 V條件。這意味著即使中國實驗室使用IEC 62109方法重新測試，50 Hz測試配置也無法涵蓋蘇里南60 Hz運行環境。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — not accepted by SSB/EAS/EBS as IEC 62109 equivalent

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 safety certification does not satisfy the IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence expected by SSB, EAS, and EBS for PV inverters in Suriname. Two compounding gaps exist: (1) the standard gap — GB/T 37408 is not harmonised with IEC 62109; (2) the frequency gap — Chinese safety tests are conducted at 50 Hz, while Suriname operates at 60 Hz. Exporters must obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model or family, tested under 60 Hz grid conditions. Existing Chinese safety certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 must be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 test reports before submitting equipment documentation for EBS interconnection review or project-owner approval in Suriname.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408安全认证不满足苏里南SSB、EAS和EBS对光伏逆变器IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据的要求。存在两个复合差距：（1）标准差距——GB/T 37408未与IEC 62109协调；（2）频率差距——中国安全测试在50 Hz下进行，而苏里南运行频率为60 Hz。出口商须从ILAC认可实验室取得涵盖特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书，且须在60 Hz电网条件下测试。在为苏里南提交EBS互联审查或项目业主审批所需设备文件前，仅依据GB/T 37408的现有中国安全证书须补充IEC 62109-1/-2测试报告。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408安全認證不滿足蘇里南SSB、EAS和EBS對光伏逆變器IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據的要求。存在兩個複合差距：（1）標準差距——GB/T 37408未與IEC 62109協調；（2）頻率差距——中國安全測試在50 Hz下進行，而蘇里南運行頻率為60 Hz。出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得涵蓋特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書，且須在60 Hz電網條件下測試。在為蘇里南提交EBS互聯審查或項目業主審批所需設備文件前，僅依據GB/T 37408的現有中國安全證書須補充IEC 62109-1/-2測試報告。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence is the expected safety baseline for PV inverters in Suriname under SSB's IEC adoption framework and EBS interconnection review; formal mandatory enforcement status should be confirmed with SSB and EAS directly
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2021 is a recommended national standard (GB/T designation); CQC/CGC voluntary certification available but not required under Chinese law for domestic sale

source.publisher: Surinaams Standaarden Bureau (SSB) — Suriname Standards Bureau

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A solar PV inverter holding only Chinese GB/T 37408 certification cannot satisfy the IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence expected by SSB, EAS, and EBS in Suriname. Plan for IEC 62109-1/-2 type testing by an ILAC-accredited laboratory, covering 60 Hz operating conditions, before submitting equipment documentation for Suriname project review or EBS interconnection. Confirm current SSB and EAS mandatory certification requirements directly before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB/T 37408认证的太阳能光伏逆变器不能满足苏里南SSB、EAS和EBS预期的IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据要求。请在提交苏里南项目审查或EBS互联所需设备文件前，安排ILAC认可实验室进行涵盖60 Hz运行条件的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验。出货前请直接向SSB和EAS确认当前强制性认证要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB/T 37408認證的太陽能光伏逆變器不能滿足蘇里南SSB、EAS和EBS預期的IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據要求。請在提交蘇里南項目審查或EBS互聯所需設備文件前，安排ILAC認可實驗室進行涵蓋60 Hz運行條件的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗。出貨前請直接向SSB和EAS確認當前強制性認證要求。
